threshold_notes: SMA bands from pooled (close-SMA)/SMA % over all cached bars: SMA9/20/50 inner=p40 |distance| (hugging ends), outer=p88 tail (stretched); SMA200 modest=p50 / extended=p88 on positive side (mirrored below); no near band.

candle_detection_thresholds.hammer_body_position: upper third (close/open in top 35% of range)

scans.name: EMA fast crossed above EMA slow
EMA fast crossed below EMA slow
Weekend gap up (Monday open vs Friday close)
Gap fill up (price back through pre-gap close)
Inverted hammer (long upper wick, body low)
Bullish engulfing
scans.detection_threshold: prior bearish body engulfed by bullish candle

scans.name: Bearish engulfing
scans.detection_threshold: prior bullish body engulfed by bearish candle

scans.name: Bullish harami
scans.detection_threshold: today body inside prior bearish body

scans.name: Bearish harami
scans.detection_threshold: today body inside prior bullish body

composites.name: Volatility Squeeze
composites.description: Compression resolving upward: narrow range, volatility expanding, price pushing higher.

composites.name: Uptrend Squeeze Breakout
composites.description: Strong uptrend: Bollinger squeeze within the last 5 sessions, then close above the upper band today.

composites.name: Oversold Reversal
composites.description: Stretched below moving averages and oversold, with a reversal candle forming.

composites.name: Trend Pullback — Long
composites.description: Uptrend: 3-bar pullback in the last 2 sessions, momentum turn up today (stochastic or RSI).

composites.name: Trend Pullback — Short
composites.description: Downtrend: 3-bar pullback in the last 2 sessions, momentum turn down today (stochastic or RSI).

composites.name: Breakdown Expansion
composites.description: Breaking down out of a weak regime with volatility expanding.

composites.name: Failed Breakout / Bull Trap
composites.description: Pushed to new highs, overbought, then showing reversal candles.

composites.name: Golden Cross Regime Shift
composites.description: Long-term trend flips up with momentum confirming.

composites.name: Weekend Gap Fade
composites.description: Weekend gap with early signs of fill or reversal against the gap direction.

currency_strength.methodology: Technical strength from current scan/composite leans per pair using a net-margin rule (net = bullish_scan_count - bearish_scan_count): net >= +2 -> pair leans bullish (base +1, quote -1); net <= -2 -> bearish (base -1, quote +1); net in {-1,0,+1} -> mixed (0); no directional scans -> neutral (0). Only bullish/bearish scans count; neutral scans never contribute. Normalized = technical_strength_score / pairs_involved.
currency_strength.snapshot_note: Snapshot of technical scan state on trade_date only; not fundamental strength, not predictive.
